translations.Create key-pairs that map an Access Key: Create key-pairs that map an Access Key / Secret Key to a Nextcloud user (Mode B).
translations.Label: Label
translations.Create a dedicated S3 Access Key / Secre: Create a dedicated S3 Access Key / Secret Key pair for your account (Mode A). The secret is shown only once — save it immediately.
translations.New key-pair created — save the Access K: New key-pair created — save the Access Key and Secret Key now, the secret will not be shown again.
